results.title: What Is Dusking? The Mindful Travel Trend Everyone Is Talking About
results.description: Dusking is the latest wellness travel trend encouraging people to pause, unplug, and enjoy sunsets mindfully instead of chasing packed itineraries or social media content. Inspired by a memorable moment from Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani, this slow travel practice promotes digital detox, mental well-being, and meaningful travel experiences through quiet connection with nature.
